titleStmt.title: SII 39.117: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 117. (A.R. No. 117 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. SIVADHARMAPURIŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE EAST TIER OF THE POYYĀMOḺI-IŚVARA TEMPLE, AT THE FOOT OF THE SAME HILL TRIBHUVANACHA[KRAVARTIN VĪRAPĀṆḌYA DĒVA,-6TH YEAR, [13TH CENTURY A.D.]

summary.p: Incomplete. This inscription refers to a grant of some additional land made by one Gāngeyanto the bhattars of the Koṟṟamaṅgalam in lieu of some old land which was not suitable for cultivation, for doing priestly functions in the temple of Poyyāmoḻi-Iśvaramuḍaiyanāyaṇār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
hara svastiśrī tiripuvaṉa cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 6 vatu
ñcamiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ puramalaināṭṭu poṉṉamarāpati mutalikaḷil veṭṭuvaṭṭuvāṉ vaṉeṉ Innāṭṭut tirukkoḷakku
ṭiyil Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumalai Aṭivārattil muṉpu
ḻiīśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukkun tiruppaṇikkuk kuṭutta nilamāvatu niyamattut tevar kāṅkeya tevar pakkal nāṉ muṉpu vilaikoṇṭa kuṭikkel
vāyūr nāṭṭuppaṟṟuk koṟṟamaṅkalattu vayalukkuk kaṭamai Antarāyam Aracuvari po
yokañ ciṟṟāyam Epperpaṭṭiṉavum Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Iruppatākak koṇṭa kāṅkeya tevar tirumukaṅ koṇṭu Eṉakkuk kārāṇmaiyāka Ivar kaiyālum svāmika
ḷ kaiyālum vilai koṇṭu Aṉupavittuvarukiṟa koṟṟaimaṅkalattu var paṭṭiṉavum nāṉ vilai koṇṭaṉupavittupaṭiye nāyaṉār poyyāmoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyum Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉārkku Atteṉam paṇṇi Akara
vaippatāka niṟcayiṟttu ponta paṭṭarkaḷukkuṅ koṭukka Ippaṭṭarkaḷ Atteṉam paṇṇap potāmaiyālum Innilam payir ceytal ceyvittal ceyāmaiyālum Ivarkaḷukkuk koṭutta nilam payireri kaṭamai Iruttāmaiyālum Ippaṭṭakarukkuk koṭutta nilattukku piratikṣetramāka nāṉ
pūṅkuḷa nāṭṭār pakkal nāṉ vilaikoṇṭaṉupavittu varukiṟa mañcaneri vayalile nilamum kuṭuttu Ivvūrt tattile maṉaiyuṅ kuṭuttu Ippiramaṇarai koṟṟamaṅkalatti niṉṟum Ēṟaviṭṭu poyyāmoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka koṟṟa maṅkalam perunāṉ kellaikku
ḷpaṭṭa nīrnilamum naṉcey puṉceyyum nattamun toṭṭamuṅ kuḷamuṅ kuḷapparappuk kiṇaṟu maramu maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum nāṉ vilaikoṇṭu Aṉupavittapaṭiye tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāka kuṭuttu tevar Aḻakukaṇṭa perumāḷ cuntarapāṇṭiya kāṅkeyar tirumukamuṅ koṭuppittu Ikko
Digital edition of SII 39.117 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
